title: Food and drinks product system
summary: A related visual framework that allows food and drinks products to use distinct styling while remaining recognisably MiCKz.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on defining the system model, boundaries, structure, workflows or intended operation.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on meaning, recognition, identity, visual language or the designed human experience.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Brand and experience-system responsibility: A related visual framework that allows food and drinks products to use distinct styling while remaining recognisably MiCKz.

lensAssignments.rationale: This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on creating, managing, transforming or delivering media to an audience.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Media production and distribution responsibility: A related visual framework that allows food and drinks products to use distinct styling while remaining recognisably MiCKz.
